title: zinnia maritima
intro: Zinnia maritima, also known as the tidytips or coastal zinnia, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the coastal areas of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zinnia maritima include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in salves and topical creams to aid in wound healing.
